name: translation-toolkit
description: High-quality translation across i18n / technical docs / ad copy / novel chapters for EN / JA / ZH-TW / ZH-CN with bundled CC-BY glossary (~10K+ entries) and 6-gate verification (placeholder integrity / glossary compliance / deterministic post-translation linter / back-translation / register / untranslatability). v0.3.0 adds: novel whole-book pre-pass (character + world-glossary extraction), 5D literary critic (rhythm / euphony / archaism / register-shift), M3 deterministic linter for novel + doc, and cheap-model split for cost-amortized pre-pass.
